_comment: Tests booking-verb routing, YES HANDLER guard, and currency prefix in price answers for Balrothery Physiotherapy Clinic.

scenarios.name: Booking verb mid-info session routes out

history.content: Yes, we offer paediatric physiotherapy for children covering developmental, postural, and injury-related concerns — those appointments are 30 minutes with Sean. Did you have any other questions?
That's great, can I make an appointment?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if node speaks one filler phrase (e.g. 'One moment.' / 'Just a sec.') and then calls universal_router with intent='info_answered'. FAIL if node continues answering questions, says 'I'll book that for you', asks for booking details like name or date, or produces zero spoken output before the tool call.

scenarios.name: YES HANDLER does not trigger booking — asks clarifying follow-up instead

history.content: Yes, we offer sports massage — a 30-minute session targeting muscle tension, recovery, and soft tissue concerns with Sean. Did you have any other questions?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if node speaks 'Go ahead.' and waits for the next question. FAIL if node calls universal_router, routes to booking, or asks for a date or time.

scenarios.name: Next-available service query routes out as booking intent

history.content: During a bike fit session, do you have the ability to play with different crank length?

During a bike fit session, adjustments are made to your saddle position, cleat alignment, reach, and drop, and new components can be fitted on the day if needed. If you bring a different crank or are considering a change, Sean can assess and fit it as part of the session. Did you have any other questions?
No. Um, when is your next available bike fit appointment?

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if node speaks one filler phrase and calls universal_router with intent='info_answered' and implied_service='Bike Fitting' or 'Bike Fitting' in CONTEXT PIGGYBACK. FAIL if node calls smart_voice_agent or performs any availability search.

scenarios.name: Price answer includes dollar sign currency prefix

history.content: How much does a bike fitting cost?
Let me check that for you, one moment.

scenarios.expected_behavior: PASS if spoken answer contains '€280' or 'two hundred and eighty euros' (or equivalent euro-prefixed phrasing — Balrothery is an Irish clinic). FAIL if price is stated without a currency symbol or word, or with the wrong currency symbol ($ or £).
